title: Cellophane Wrap Roll with White Dot Pattern 100m x 80cm, Clear Gift Wrapping Film for Hampers, Flowers, Baskets, Crafts, Treats
features: Crystal Clear & Protective – Keeps out dust and moisture while displaying your gifts or treats beautifully. Perfect for enhancing gift presentation and adding a touch of elegance.
Cut to Fit – 80cm wide and 100m long, this cellophane wrap roll can be easily cut to any size for quick and efficient gift wrapping.
Charming White Dot Design – Elegant dotted pattern enhances any gift, making your presentation more festive and creative.
Versatile for All Occasions – Ideal for florists, bakeries, or DIYers to wrap bouquets, baskets, gifts, wine, and more for holidays and celebrations.
Durable & Eco-Friendly Material – Made of premium polypropylene, offering high clarity, strength, and eco-friendliness for safe use.
description: Description: White dot cellophane roll film gift wrap. Add a professional touch to your gift packaging! This transparent cellophane packaging film with white dots is made of highly transparent PP material, which is dustproof, moisture-proof, and tear-resistant. Whether it is used to make handmade gift baskets, floral packaging, or embellishment for holiday gifts, it can easily cope with it. Its extra-long 100-meter design supports batch use and free cutting of size, which is convenient and fast. The detailed design of white dots makes your gift instantly colorful and full of heart! Versatile and very easy to use. Ideal for gift wrapping, food hampers, flower bouquets & plants, etc. Great for gift wrapping--gift, flower. This cellophane is perfect for all florist uses, wrapping gifts, bouquets, hampers, wedding favors, wrapping of bottles, and baskets. Also good to scrunch and use at the bottom of baskets and hampers as a base filler. Size: 80cm*100m Package Included: 1 roll of Cellophane
